description: PupWiki OSM dog POI taxonomy. Uses explicit OSM tags first, then cautious name-regex fallbacks with lower confidence.

reviewRules.emergency-vets: Always display a verify-before-visiting warning unless emergency=yes is present.
reviewRules.dog-friendly-restaurants: Dog access and patio rules can change; do not claim dogs are always allowed.
reviewRules.dog-friendly-hotels: Pet policies, fees and weight limits can change; send users to official hotel site.
reviewRules.animal-breeders: Do not endorse breeders. Use neutral directory wording and add responsible-breeder guidance.

categories.label: Veterinary clinics
categories.description: Veterinary clinics and animal hospitals from explicit OSM veterinary tags.

categories.label: Emergency vets
categories.description: Emergency or urgent veterinary locations. Emergency availability must be verified before visiting.

categories.label: Animal rehabilitation and physio
categories.description: Canine or animal rehabilitation, physiotherapy and recovery services.

rules.nameRegex: animal rehab|pet rehab|canine rehab|veterinary rehabilitation|dog physiotherapy|canine physical therapy

categories.label: Pet stores
categories.description: Pet stores and dog supply retailers.

categories.label: Dog grooming
categories.description: Dog groomers, pet salons and grooming-focused businesses.

categories.label: Dog bakeries
categories.description: Dog bakeries and dog treat shops.

categories.label: Dog training
categories.description: Dog training, obedience, puppy classes and canine behavior services.

rules.nameRegex: dog training|obedience|puppy class|canine training|dog trainer|canine obedience|behavior training

categories.label: Animal breeders
categories.description: Animal breeding locations. Use neutral directory wording and responsible-breeder warnings.

categories.label: Animal shelters
categories.description: Animal shelters and rescues.

categories.label: Dog boarding and daycare
categories.description: Dog boarding, kennels and dog daycare services.

rules.nameRegex: dog daycare|dog boarding|kennel|pet boarding|dog hotel|pet resort

categories.label: Dog walkers
categories.description: Dog walkers and pet sitting services.

categories.label: Dog parks
categories.description: Official dog parks and off-leash dog areas.

categories.label: Dog-friendly beaches
categories.description: Beaches where OSM indicates dog access. Rules can be seasonal.

categories.label: Pet-friendly hotels
categories.description: Hotels with OSM pet/dog access tags. Fees and policies must be verified.

categories.label: Dog-friendly restaurants and cafes
categories.description: Restaurants, cafes, bars and pubs with OSM dog access tags.

categories.label: Dog-friendly parks
categories.description: Parks with dog access tags that are not necessarily dog parks.

categories.label: Dog waste facilities
categories.description: Dog waste baskets, dog toilets and cleanup facilities.

categories.label: Dog water points
categories.description: Dog-accessible drinking water points.

categories.label: Dog wash
categories.description: Dog wash and self-service pet wash locations.

rules.nameRegex: dog wash|pet wash|self service pet wash|self-service pet wash

categories.label: Pet aftercare
categories.description: Pet crematoriums, pet cemeteries and memorial services.
